notes: v246 — The big one: signals now load automatically, every time. Found and fixed the root cause of the missing Signals column: the automatic preparation engine computed streaks, averages and scores but never the four signal flags (Accum? / Inst? / unusual EOD / block trades) — only live downloads and the manual refresh button did. So anything loaded from saved data showed '— none' everywhere and the ACCUM? counter sat on zero. Those flags are now computed in the same pass as everything else, from your saved data too. Also: opening the app is now instant — with saved data on the device it shows your full market with all signals within seconds, then fetches today's fresh prices quietly in the background (if that fails, your saved view simply stays). And when a download ends with some shares missing, the app now retries them automatically instead of waiting for you to press 'Finish the rest'.
